name: Supercash (Alimentos Y Bebidas Premium)
message: Supercash is a family business with over 40 years of experience. We specialize in distributing a wide variety of products for the hospitality industry. We offer convenient shopping and personalized service. We have five cash and carry centers located throughout the northern region: Oviedo, Avilés, Gijón, Valladolid, and León.They are clients of Gesimde Asociados S.L. The leak was made possible by this company.DatabasePersonal information of employees and clientsFinancial documents https://www.supercash.es/
